item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Crispy saithe fish cakes with silky white wine sauce with dill, butter-browned potatoes and baked courgette, topped with a fine green salad. With fresh herb vinaigrette. (1+2+3+6+13)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Moroccan lamb tagine braised with seasonal vegetables and dried apricot, served with coarse couscous tossed with herbs and topped with drained yoghurt sprinkled with sweet chilli. With green salad tossed with sumac and lemon. (1+6+13+15) Moroccan mushroom tagine braised with seasonal vegetables and dried apricot, served with coarse couscous tossed with herbs and topped with drained yoghurt sprinkled with sweet chilli. With green salad tossed with sumac and lemon. (1+6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: GREEN DISH: dish

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Slow-roasted pork neck with leek, tarragon, asparagus and mustard, topped with a fresh and fragrant herb salad. (11+15) GREEN DISH: dish Juicy vegan meatballs with leek, tarragon, asparagus and mustard, topped with a fresh and fragrant herb salad. (11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Slow-cooked chilli con carne with depth and warmth, served with steamed rice, silky avocado cream and crispy nacho chips. (6+15) GREEN DISH: dish Spiced chilli sin carne with depth and warmth, served with steamed rice, silky avocado cream and crispy nacho chips. (6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Silky smooth chicken stew with seasonal vegetables, served on fluffy butter-mounted mashed potato topped with fresh chives. With crisp pickled cucumbers on the side. (6+10+15) GREEN DISH: dish Silky smooth soy protein stew with seasonal vegetables, served on fluffy butter-mounted mashed potato topped with fresh chives. With crisp pickled cucumbers on the side. (6+10+15)
